CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2026 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-20-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-19-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Compel Further Responses From Defendant Abdul Muqim Ameeri, To Form Interrogatories, Set One, And Special Interrogatories, Set One, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-24-2025 Advanced From Jan-29-26 To Jan-26-26 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF NI PETERKOFSKY Motion To Compel Further Responses From Defendant Abdul Muqim Ameeri, To Form Interrogatories, Set One, And Special Interrogatories, Set One, And For Sanctions

Motion To Compel Further Responses From Defendant Abdul Muqim Ameeri, To Form Interrogatories, Set One, And Special Interrogatories, Set One, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-26-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Prior to the hearing the court received an email from Plaintiff/Moving party Albert G. Stoll, Esq. requesting the matter be taken off-calendar. The Court grants the request.

No appearances. The Court vacates the tentative ruling and rules as follows:

Plaintiff Ni Zhou Peterkofsky's motion to compel further responses to Form Interrogatories, Set One and Special Interrogatories, Set One from Defendant Abdul Muqim Ameeri is off-calendar per request of the moving party and approval of the court.

Visiting Judge: Cindee Mayfield, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/CM)

Motion To Compel Further Responses From Defendant Abdul Muqim Ameeri, To Form Interrogatories, Set One, And Special Interrogatories, Set One, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-23-2025 Continued To Jan-29-26 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

The court received a notice to contest the matter.

No Hearing held today due to Power Outage. The Court rules as follows:

Plaintiff Ni Zhou Peterkofsky's motion to compel further responses to Form Interrogatories, Set One and Special Interrogatories, Set One from Defendant Abdul Muqim Ameeri.

The Court specially sets the matter to be heard by Visiting Judge Cindee Mayfield on 1/29/26 at 1:30pm in Dept.302.

Visiting Judge: Cindee Mayfield, Not Reported. (302/CM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-15-2025 Set For Trial On Mar-30-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
